concerns.text: Task T032 implements 'lagged variable analysis' (Plan.md Critical Note) but has no corresponding Functional Requirement (FR-001 to FR-007) or User Story in spec.md. The spec does not mandate this feature, making T032 an untracked implementation of scope creep. A task exists for a requirement that does not exist in the spec.

Task T033 implements 'interaction term analysis' (Plan.md Complexity Tracking) but lacks a corresponding FR or US in spec.md. While FR-004 mentions controls, it does not explicitly mandate interaction terms with project age. This task implements a plan element not anchored to a spec requirement.

Task T008b mandates 'FAIL LOUDLY' on clone failure, contradicting spec.md Edge Cases which require the system to 'skip and log, not crash'. While this is a logic error, it also represents a missing task: there is no task explicitly covering the 'skip and log' error handling behavior required by the spec's Edge Cases for deleted/private repos.

Success Criterion SC-001 requires processing ≥95% of 500 repos within 6 hours. While T027 benchmarks a 'representative set', there is no specific task to implement the full-scale performance validation or timeout logic required to guarantee the 6-hour SLA on the target dataset size. The plan element (Performance Goals) is not fully covered by a specific implementation task.

Task T010 contains a syntax error in the test description: 'Assert unique author count is.' (missing value). This is a writing defect in the task definition, though the intent (testing author count) is covered by the task description.
